title: Xtra Crispy Turkish Oyster Mushrooms Borek
description: A crispy and savory Turkish dish featuring oyster mushrooms, perfect for a monsoon day, this borek is keto-friendly and made with score-fat, providing a delicious and fresh meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the melted score-fat, eggs, and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a thin sheet.
In a separate pan, saute the oyster mushrooms until they are tender and lightly browned.
Place a quarter of the mushrooms onto one end of each dough sheet, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges with water and fold the dough over the mushrooms to form a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops with egg wash and bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
